mods.name: High-Flow Intake
mods.description: A performance intake for the 2.3L EcoBoost engine improves turbo induction sound and provides marginally better airflow.
mods.installNotes: Remove stock airbox and accordion hose. Install new intake pipe and filter. Ensure MAF sensor housing matches stock diameter. 20 minutes. No tune required.

mods.name: Catback Exhaust
mods.description: Open up the 2.3L EcoBoost exhaust note with a performance catback. The stock system is extremely quiet for a performance car.
mods.installNotes: Bolt-on from the downpipe flange back. Dual exit matches factory bumper valance. Hangs on factory rubber mounts. No cutting required. 1 hour install.

mods.name: Intercooler Upgrade
mods.description: The Focus RS intercooler is undersized and heat soaks rapidly. An upgraded unit is essential for consistent power, especially in warm climates.
mods.installNotes: Remove front bumper and stock intercooler. New unit uses factory mounting points. Larger core provides 30–50°F reduction in charge air temps. 2–3 hour install.

mods.name: ECU Tune (Mountune/Cobb)
mods.description: The EcoBoost 2.3L responds incredibly well to tuning. Stage 1 adds 40–50hp with no hardware changes. Mountune tunes preserve the factory warranty.
mods.partNumbers: Cobb AccessPort AP3-FOR-004, Mountune m365 Tune
mods.installNotes: Flash via OBD-II with Cobb AccessPort or Mountune mTune. Start with Stage 1 on 93 octane. Mountune tunes are dealer-approved and warranty-safe. Log boost and knock data.

mods.name: Performance Downpipe
mods.description: Replace the restrictive factory downpipe with a high-flow catted or catless unit for faster turbo spool and significant power gains when tuned.
mods.partNumbers: Mountune High Flow Sports Cat, Depo Racing Catless DP
mods.installNotes: Access from below. The factory downpipe is tight against the subframe. Pre-soak all bolts. Must retune after install. Catless requires tune to suppress CEL. 2 hours on a lift.

mods.name: Coilover Suspension
mods.description: Adjustable coilovers provide precise ride height and damping control for the RS's sophisticated AWD chassis. Transforms track capability.
mods.partNumbers: KW V3 35230089, Fortune Auto 500 Series RS
mods.installNotes: Full strut replacement at all corners. The RS rear uses a unique independent rear suspension. Ensure coilovers are RS-specific. Set ride height 15mm below stock. Full alignment required.

mods.name: Upgraded Turbocharger
mods.description: The stock turbo runs out of efficiency around 380hp. A hybrid or upgraded turbo supports 400–500hp on the 2.3L EcoBoost platform.
mods.partNumbers: Mountune MRX Turbo, ATP GTX2867R GEN2 bolt-on kit
mods.installNotes: Remove intake manifold and turbo heat shield for access. Upgraded unit bolts to factory exhaust manifold. Requires larger injectors, HPFP internals, and custom tune. 12+ hour job.

mods.name: Rear Motor Mount Insert
mods.description: Fill the factory rear motor mount void with a polyurethane insert to dramatically reduce wheel hop and improve power transfer under hard launches.
mods.partNumbers: Boomba Racing RMM Insert, Mountune RMM Insert 2363-RMM-AA
mods.installNotes: Jack up the engine slightly, slide the insert into the mount void, lower the engine. 10 minute install. Slight increase in NVH (vibration) at idle is normal and minimal.
